# Human Verification Gate

## Overview

The `explored: false` frontmatter flag on AI-created pages. Only humans
set it to `true` after reviewing the page. Functions as the visible
marker of the staged-autonomy trust curve.

## Key Claims

- All AI-created pages start with `explored: false`
- Only humans flip it to `true`
- Vault Health dashboard surfaces unreviewed pages for the review queue

## Counter-arguments

*None identified yet.*

## Data Gaps

*None identified yet.*
